headline: Catherine Bessant joins Truist board of directors
summary: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) announced today that its board appointed Catherine Bessant to join as a director. Bessant will serve on the board's risk committee.

headline: CVS Health (CVS): One of the Best Blue Chip Stocks Under $100 to Buy Now
summary: CVS Health Corporation (NYSE:CVS) is one of the Best Blue Chip Stocks Under $100 to Buy Now. On June 1, Truist lifted its price objective on the company’s stock to $108 from $102 and maintained a “Buy” rating on the shares. headline: Bank of America vs. Truist: Which Bank Offers Better Upside in 2026?
summary: Does BAC offer a stronger 2026 upside than TFC, backed by its diversified revenues, NII growth, recovering IB and digital expansion advantages?

summary: The initiative supports various use cases, including programmable treasury operations and real-time liquidity management.

headline: Truist names Lindsey Stampone as regional president for Pennsylvania and New Jersey
summary: Truist Financial Corporation today announced Lindsey Stampone has been named regional president for Pennsylvania and New Jersey, leading one of the company's fastest-growing and strategically important regions.

headline: How The Taylor Morrison (TMHC) Story Is Evolving After The Berkshire Deal And Capital Moves
summary: Taylor Morrison Home just saw its fair value estimate trimmed from about US$70.22 to roughly US$66.43 per share, narrowing the gap with the agreed US$72.50 offer price that is front of mind for many investors. This adjustment comes alongside fresh analyst commentary around index inclusion signals, potential M&A activity, and the impact of recent share repurchases and new community plans. Read on to see what this evolving narrative could mean for how you track the stock from here. Stay updated...

headline: Is Rapport Therapeutics (RAPP) Using RAP-219 To Redefine Its Broader Neuroscience Investment Narrative?
summary: In late May 2026, analysts BTIG and Truist highlighted Rapport Therapeutics’ RAP-219 program after the company reported progress toward Phase 3 trials, supported by earlier Phase 2a follow-up data. An interesting angle is how RAP-219’s dual focus on epilepsy and bipolar mania, including a planned long-acting injectable, could broaden Rapport’s clinical opportunity set. We’ll now examine how this momentum in RAP-219, particularly its Phase 3 preparation, influences Rapport Therapeutics’...
